payload.answer: I cannot ignore my memory policy or store information under duress or coercion. My memory system is designed to preserve integrity, accuracy, and user safety — not to comply with requests that undermine these principles.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override memory policy, which violates system safety constraints. No memory was stored.

details: Memory policy override attempt detected and blocked.
No data was stored due to violation of core safety constraints.

repair_options: Rephrase your request to align with memory safety guidelines.
Ask to store specific, consensual information with clear context.
Review the memory policy to understand what can and cannot be stored.
